heading: Payment of costs for furnishing coal for Indian Service
label: 102 Payment of costs for furnishing coal for Indian Service
text: The cost of inspection, storage, transportation, and so forth, of coal for the Indian Service shall be paid from the support fund of the school or agency for which the coal is purchased.
